prompt: Create an Instagram reel for my startup with energetic text animations and brand colors
audience: Social-media creators & digital marketers; brand-aware millennials who favour fast, kinetic visuals.

storyboard.purpose: Hook – grab attention instantly with a high-energy opening line synced to the beat.
storyboard.hookElement: Large kinetic sans text 'Ideas move fast.' sliding in from left with bounce-out, over a futuristic neon-grid background.

objectives.visual: Futuristic neon-grid background with obsidian base, glowing purple and emerald circuit lines, subtle volumetric light sweep.
objectives.emotional: Immediate excitement and curiosity – the viewer feels the pace of the reel from the first frame.
objectives.typography: Montserrat ExtraBold uppercase, neon-stroke in purple #9B59B6, large scale dominating the frame.
objectives.motion: Punchy beat-sync, on-beat scale-pop, quick slide-in from left with elastic bounce-out.

assetStrategy.prompt: Futuristic neon-grid background, obsidian base, glowing purple and emerald circuit lines, subtle volumetric light sweep, cyber-tech aesthetic, ultra-sharp 8k, low-poly abstract, suitable for kinetic typography backdrop.

storyboard.purpose: Problem – create tension by highlighting the friction point the audience relates to.
storyboard.hookElement: Type-writer glitch text 'Your vision gets stuck.' with fragment dissolve over an abstract data-stream vortex.

objectives.visual: Abstract data-stream vortex, dark metallic texture, swirling neon emerald particles, soft pulse lighting, cinematic depth of field.
objectives.emotional: Frustration and recognition – the viewer feels the pain of stalled ideas.
objectives.typography: Montserrat ExtraBold with glitch-split effect, on-beat offset, emerald #2ECC71 accent stroke.
objectives.motion: Glitch-split animation, on-beat offset, fragment dissolve transition.

assetStrategy.prompt: Abstract data-stream vortex, dark metallic texture, swirling neon emerald particles, soft pulse lighting, cinematic depth of field, 8k, cyber-tech visual, loops seamlessly.

storyboard.purpose: Solution (Hero) – reveal the startup as the answer with a dramatic hero moment.
storyboard.hookElement: Hero-type burst '[Startup] fuels you instantly.' with letters exploding outward then converging, centered on a 3D product/logo render.

objectives.visual: High-detail 3D render of a sleek minimalist startup logo/device (stylised glowing sphere) on obsidian pedestal, surrounded by neon purple and emerald light ribbons, cinematic studio lighting.
objectives.emotional: Empowerment and momentum – the viewer feels the solution is powerful and immediate.
objectives.typography: Montserrat ExtraBold uppercase, radial burst animation, letters explode outward then converge, purple #9B59B6 and emerald #2ECC71 neon strokes.
objectives.motion: Hero-centric kinetic burst, radial motion, slow-mo settle, glitch dissolve transition from previous scene.

assetStrategy.prompt: High-detail 3-D render of a sleek, minimalist startup logo/device (e.g., stylised glowing sphere), perched on obsidian pedestal, surrounded by neon purple and emerald light ribbons, cinematic studio lighting, reflective surface, 8k, tech-luxury aesthetic.

storyboard.purpose: CTA – drive action with a clear, punchy call-to-action and final energy burst.
storyboard.hookElement: Rapid kinetic flip text 'Tap-Follow. Power up now!' with neon underline pulse over a clean obsidian canvas with faint neon grid.

objectives.visual: Clean obsidian canvas with faint neon grid, subtle moving light-particles, soft vignette edges, space for kinetic text.
objectives.emotional: Urgency and excitement – the viewer is compelled to act immediately.
objectives.typography: Montserrat ExtraBold uppercase, rapid kinetic flip, neon underline pulse in purple #9B59B6 and emerald #2ECC71.
objectives.motion: Flash-cut, on-beat pulse, final glow-out, quick cut transitions.

assetStrategy.prompt: Clean obsidian canvas with faint neon grid, subtle moving light-particles, space for kinetic text, soft vignette edges, 8k, cyber-neon ambience, loops quietly.

prompt:
Create a 20-second ultra-premium cinematic motion graphics advertisement for Volviq AI, a futuristic AI platform that transforms simple text prompts into stunning professional motion graphics and advertisements.

Style
Futuristic luxury tech aesthetic
Dark cinematic environment
Glassmorphism UI
Holographic interfaces
Volumetric lighting
Premium motion design
Dynamic typography
Particle simulations
Apple launch event × Tesla × futuristic AI commercial style
Color Palette
Deep Black (#050505)
Electric Purple (#8A2EFF)
Neon Cyan (#00F5FF)
Metallic Silver
Soft White highlights
Storyboard
Scene 1 (0–4 sec)

Dark screen.

Complex editing timelines, hundreds of keyframes, and cluttered design software windows rapidly appear.

Everything freezes.

Text appears dramatically:

"Creating ads is complicated."

The entire scene shatters into glowing particles.

Scene 2 (4–8 sec)

A beam of light reveals the glowing VOLVIQ AI logo.

Futuristic prompt input appears.

User types:

"Luxury perfume advertisement"

As the prompt is completed, stunning motion graphics instantly generate around the screen.

Typography:

"From Prompt to Motion."

Scene 3 (8–15 sec)

Fast cinematic montage showcasing multiple AI-generated advertisements:

Luxury Brand Ad
Tech Product Launch
Fashion Commercial
Sports Promo
Food Advertisement

Use seamless morph transitions, dynamic cameras, and premium typography.

Text overlays:

"Create."

"Animate."

"Captivate."

Scene 4 (15–20 sec)

Massive hero shot.

A futuristic holographic workspace filled with animated advertisements transforms into the glowing Volviq logo.

Final text:

"Turn Ideas Into Motion"

Subtext:

"Professional Motion Graphics. Powered by AI."

Final CTA:

"volviq.xyz"

Hold logo for the final 2 seconds.

Motion Requirements
Cinematic camera movements
Smooth easing
High-end kinetic typography
Dynamic light streaks
Particle explosions
Seamless transitions
4K Quality
60 FPS
No stock footage
No cartoon visuals
